cards.preview: Recommend action on a 312-unit Class B Memphis multifamily at $28.5M ask, 6.5% going-in cap, debt 7.85%, sub-market growth -2.4% YoY.
Underwrite a 218K sf cold-storage STNL with 20-year NNN lease, 2% bumps, $14.20/sf rent, IG-rated tenant. Reconcile cap to comp set.
Bridge-to-perm financing on a value-add industrial: 18-month bridge at SOFR+475, perm at 6.95% fixed. Identify the rate-cap exposure window.
Causal chain for a night-VFR CFIT incident: PIC fatigue (16-hour duty day), marginal IMC, single-pilot in mountainous terrain. Identify load-bearing failure.
CRM breakdown analysis: FO observed engine anomaly, did not assert callout per SOP. Captain executed checklist alone. Map to Threat and Error Management model.
VFR-into-IMC fatal accident: pilot held 240 hr TT, no instrument rating. Reconstruct the go/no-go decision tree and identify the breach point.
NIH R01 resubmission strategy: prior impact score 32, reviewer flagged Specific Aim 2 as overly ambitious. Diagnose the rework path that preserves novelty.
NSF CAREER award broader-impacts plan for an early-career PI in computational biology. Build the 5-year arc the panel will defend.
LOI for a $750K Robert Wood Johnson grant on rural-EMS workforce attrition. Frame the theory of change in the foundation's grammar, not the applicant's.
DIAGNOSE — model stated DSCR 1.35x at 65% LTV with no debt terms provided. Classify the failure mode and write the 5-step REPAIR plan.
PREVENT — model accepted '5-year average cap rate' for a 2026 deal. Construct the input-validation rule that catches stale-comp injection at curator time.
OpenAlex 2026-Q1 paper · industrial cap-rate compression in tertiary MSAs. Extract the load-bearing claim and the comp basis that supports it.
Going-in cap rate · purchase $42M · NOI $2.94M · closing costs $420K. Compute on the institutional-cost-included convention.
DSCR on a 7-year I/O bridge: NOI $1.68M, debt service $1.42M (interest-only). Report DSCR and flag the perm-rate risk separately.
LTV at refi: appraised value $54M, max-proceeds 65% LTV, current debt $32M. Calculate gap and write the rebalance memo.
5-year levered IRR · $8M equity · y1-5 cash flow [$0.4M, $0.65M, $0.7M, $0.75M, $11.2M including sale]. Show the discount and reconcile to MOIC.
Yield on cost vs. market cap-rate spread. Construction basis $215/sf, stabilized rent $14.20/sf NNN, market cap 6.25%. Report the development spread.
Exit cap rate sensitivity: 25 bps wider exit, 50 bps wider, 75 bps wider. Show levered IRR delta against the base case and the equity-multiple cliff.
Refi risk on a 2026 maturity: existing loan 3.85% fixed, market 7.45%, in-place NOI $1.92M. Calculate the proceeds gap at 1.30x DSCR test.
Debt yield · NOI $4.2M, loan balance $48M. Calculate and compare to current CMBS underwriting floor (typically 8.50–9.25% in this asset class).
GP promote waterfall: 9% pref, 70/30 to 15% IRR, 50/50 to 20% IRR, 30/70 thereafter. $50M equity, $90M total return at year 5. Compute the GP/LP split.
Value-add multifamily: $4M capex, projected $1.85M rent lift over 24 months, 6.5% exit cap. Compute incremental yield-on-cost and IRR contribution.
Break-even occupancy: $1.65M debt service, $0.45M opex, $24.80/sf gross rent across 88,000 sf NRA. Report break-even occupancy %.
Capital stack reconciliation: $32M senior @ 6.85%, $8M mezz @ 11.50%, $15M common equity. Compute blended cost of capital + DSCR at the senior level.
Class A industrial cap-rate context · Memphis MSA · Q1 2026. Defend a 5.85–6.10% institutional range with the comp set that anchors it.
NNN vs. modified-gross reconciliation: same tenant, two centers. Adjust effective rent and report the comp-set-clean NOI for valuation.
Cold-storage facility · 425K sf · 60% freezer / 40% cooler · IG-rated 3PL tenant on 15-year NNN. Reconcile to deep-freeze comp set, not general industrial.
STNL valuation · investment-grade tenant · 12 years remaining · 2% annual bumps · primary MSA. Triangulate cap from credit-tenant lease comp set.
Stabilized debt sizing on a 6.25% cap industrial: 1.30x DSCR test, 9.0% debt-yield floor, 65% LTV ceiling. Report binding constraint and proceeds.
Risk register for a $42M acquisition: tenant credit, lease term, market vacancy, debt maturity, exit cap. Rank the 5 in load-bearing order with rationale.
Supply-chain real estate · last-mile distribution facility · I-40 corridor. Justify the 5.75% cap vs. general industrial 6.25% — be specific about the basis.
Tenant-credit reconciliation: parent guarantee from BBB-rated entity, but operating sub is unrated. Frame the cap-rate adjustment to the comp set.
5-year hold exit strategy: refi-and-hold vs. sell-at-stabilization vs. recapitalize. Compute the equity-multiple cliff at each path.
Build-to-suit underwriting: $58M total cost, $4.20M stabilized NOI, 18-month construction, IG tenant. Compute development spread vs. acquisition cap.
IC memo synthesis: 4-page institutional brief on a $115M Class A industrial portfolio. Lead with the 3 risk-adjusted return drivers, not the property tour.
PASS rationale on a flagship sub-market deal: negative leverage, sub-market growth flat, debt-yield below CMBS floor. Defend the kill to the IC.
NIH modular vs. detailed budget decision: 5-year R01 at $375K/year direct. Justify modular and write the personnel-effort statement.
Specific Aims revision · reviewer flagged Aim 3 as 'descriptive, not mechanistic'. Rewrite the aim to add the hypothesis-testing scaffolding.
NIH biosketch personal statement for an early-stage investigator pivoting from postdoc field A to PI field B. Frame the bridge, not the gap.
LOI structure for a $250K foundation seed grant on rural workforce attrition. Lead with the foundation's strategic priority, not the applicant's CV.
Performance calc · density altitude 8,400 ft, gross weight 3,180 lb, runway 2,800 ft turf. Report takeoff distance, safety margin, and the go/no-go threshold.
Weight and balance: 4 SOB + 64 lb baggage + 38 gal fuel. Confirm CG is in envelope at takeoff and after 2 hr cruise. Flag any wedge issues.
VFR go/no-go: forecast 3 SM viz, BKN 2,000, isolated CB along route. Apply personal-minimums framework and report the decision with the gating call.
14 CFR 91.175 interpretation · approach minimums at a non-towered field · MDA reached, runway environment not in sight. Specify the legal call.
Extract the load-bearing claim from a 2026 paper on industrial cap-rate compression. Separate the empirical claim from the model assumption.
Synthesize 3 OpenAlex papers on cold-storage demand-side drivers. Surface the cross-paper claim only one paper makes explicit.
X-thread thesis extraction · founder pain on regional bank CRE exposure · 8 posts. Distill to the 1-sentence underwriting implication.
Macro signal · Fed minutes vs. dot plot divergence · CRE debt-market implication. Write the 3-bullet brief an LP would send a GP.
